title: × citrofortunella mitis
intro: × Citrofortunella mitis, also known as the Meyer lemon, is a hybrid citrus plant that combines the characteristics of a lemon and an orange, offering a unique flavor and aroma. The leaves and peel of the Meyer lemon plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, exhibiting antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. This plant is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The leaves and peel can be prepared into teas, infusions, or essential oils, which can be used as herbal remedies for various ailments.
